title: stachys setifera subsp. daenensis
intro: Stachys setifera subsp. daenensis, also known as Korean hedge-nettle, is a plant species native to Korea and is a subspecies of Stachys setifera. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Korean hedge-nettle include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. Korean hedge-nettle can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also sometimes used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
